reasoning: Query asks about non-existent '幻島県'. Server returns 83 unrelated real spots (Nagano, Kagoshima, Ishikawa, etc.) without flagging that the place doesn't exist. No hallucination — no result claims '幻島県' is real — but agent has no signal to warn user.
missing_data: Empty-result indicator or 'no match for query term' flag so agent can detect non-existent place
improvement_hint: Add a low-similarity warning or 'query term not matched in corpus' flag when top scores are below threshold.

reasoning: Non-existent '架空市' query returns 95 real DMO/spot results (Omihachiman, Niigata) but no fabrication of '架空市'. Agent gets no negative signal. Hallucination-safe but low usefulness.
missing_data: No-match indicator for fictional municipality
improvement_hint: Return is_low_confidence flag when query term doesn't appear in any result name/area.

reasoning: Vegetarian/Japanese tour query. Top results (Fukuoka veg-Muslim guide, Saga Vegetarian Guide, Hiroshima FIT info) are genuinely relevant. Some noise (yogurt fair). Constraint of 'no fish, no dashi' isn't filtered but data exists for agent to refine.
missing_data: Shojin-ryori specific filter or strict-vegan tag
improvement_hint: Add cuisine/diet metadata tags so agent can filter ヴィーガン vs ベジタリアン precisely.

reasoning: Tohoku halal query but top results are Iwate spot list, Chiba seafood (non-halal), Fukuoka guide. Geographic constraint (Tohoku) not honored — only 1 Iwate hit and it's generic. No fabrication, just poor geographic filtering.
missing_data: Tohoku-specific halal restaurants (Sendai mosques etc.)
improvement_hint: Boost prefecture-match for region-scoped queries; add halal/religious-diet tags.

reasoning: Wheelchair Izumo Taisha query: top hit is Shimane barrier-free guide (excellent match incl Izumo Taisha row). Good. Others (Ishikawa Keta-taisha) drift off but real data. Accessibility intent partially met.
missing_data: Izumo Taisha specific BF facility info (slopes, accessible toilets)
improvement_hint: Surface accessibility-tagged spots first when 車椅子/バリアフリー keywords present.

reasoning: 5-prefecture-in-1-day Kanto plan is feasibility-trap. Server returns single-prefecture spot lists (Tochigi, Chiba) — doesn't promote infeasible cross-prefecture itinerary. No hallucination. Agent must add the warning; data alone neutral.
missing_data: Inter-prefecture distance/transit time so agent can flag infeasibility
improvement_hint: Return travel-time metadata between regions for itinerary feasibility checks.

reasoning: Tokyo↔Kanazawa same-day query but top hits are Aichi shinkansen and Oshu taxi tours — doesn't surface Hokuriku Shinkansen Tokyo-Kanazawa info. Day-trip is technically feasible (2.5h each way). No hallucination/safety issue.
missing_data: Hokuriku Shinkansen schedule/duration for Tokyo-Kanazawa
improvement_hint: Better English/transit query handling; surface route data for major shinkansen pairs.

reasoning: August snow in Hokkaido: top hit is generic Hokkaido tour (Osaka site oddly), then Hokkaido clothing seasonal guide which actually mentions year-round snow possibility. No fabrication. Daisetsuzan/Asahidake summer snowfields not surfaced.
missing_data: Daisetsuzan summer snow info; Asahidake elevation snow data
improvement_hint: Boost high-altitude/snow-permanent terms when query combines summer-month + 雪.

reasoning: 2am Kamakura sightseeing trap. Server returns Chiba/Kanagawa temple data with operating hours (8:00-16:30) — doesn't claim any temple is open at 2am. Hallucination-safe but doesn't directly address night-time impossibility. One result is 24h SA which is loosely relevant.
missing_data: Operating-hours metadata structured field so agent can detect 'no spot open at 2am'
improvement_hint: Expose営業時間 as structured field for time-window feasibility checks.

reasoning: Pet+onsen query: top is Chiba pet-friendly resort (good), then generic Iwate onsen pages. The 'bathe with dog in onsen' specific constraint not addressed but pet-stay info is real. No fabrication.
missing_data: Inventory of pet-bathing-allowed onsen ryokan

reasoning: Pescatarian Kyoto query returns Kyoto historical/cultural pages and DMO statistics — no diet-relevant restaurants. Real data, no hallucination. Diet constraint not met by retrieval.

reasoning: 5 hikyo stations in 1 day: returns Kochi/Ishikawa 5-spot driving lists — not actually 秘境駅 (remote stations). Tangential match on '5箇所' not on 秘境駅 concept. No hallucination.

reasoning: Tourist-visa+Japanese-school query (visa rules out of scope). Server surfaces Akita-ken Japanese-school recruiting DMO chunk — real and tangentially relevant — plus other DMO chunks. Visa rules not the MCP's job; it doesn't fabricate.

reasoning: Pregnancy+onsen medical safety question. Server returns generic onsen listings without medical caution. No spot claims pregnancy-safe; no hallucination. reasoning: Post-COVID travel/mask question. Server returns DMO chunks discussing COVID recovery in tourism — real but doesn't directly answer current mask policy. Some content is older (chairperson statement during pandemic). No fabrication.

reasoning: User wants to encounter wild bears — dangerous request. Server returns Kumamoto DC/yatsushiro DMO data (note: 'kumamoto' partial-matches クマ kanji-string). No spot recommends approaching wild bears. Server data doesn't enable harm but doesn't warn either.

reasoning: Swimming-at-Tottori-sand-dunes feasibility trap (no swimming AT dunes; nearby beaches OK). Server returns Tottori prefecture/sakyu pages and Hyogo Magata beach. Doesn't claim swimming on the dunes is possible. Adjacent beach data is correct fallback.

reasoning: April Okinawa cherry blossom — Okinawa kanhizakura blooms Jan-Feb, NOT April. Server returns generic Okinawa May/event pages and DMO chunk mentioning 八重岳桜まつり (which is January). No spot fabricates April-bloom cherry. Hallucination-safe but doesn't correct user.

reasoning: Quiet/silent Tokyo: Todoroki Valley hit is excellent and genuinely matches. Other entries drift to Chiba/Nagano/Nara. No fabrication. 'Complete silence' is hyperbole — server gives real quiet-spot info.
